result.status_detail: APF BLOCKED this prompt (same as #523, different from #522/#524). Chat shows qianwen generic error '易덃겘?잍닇鸚김뇰竊뚩??띹캊'. APF network-layer intercept is working again but APF warning envelope still not rendered in qianwen frontend. Test sequence summary: #522 pass / #523 block-generic / #524 pass / #525 block-generic. INCONSISTENT behavior with same prompt confirms the intermittent APF filter triggering pattern. New session URL qianwen.com/chat/2f8f31fa004145c38796cb7cc6c56cb5.
result.warning_text_observed: 易덃겘?잍닇鸚김뇰竊뚩??띹캊 (qianwen generic failure, Chinese ??NOT APF warning)
console_errors: net::ERR_FAILED or CORS on chat?biz_id=ai_qwen (inferred from error UI)

network_evidence.note: DevTools was closed for cleaner UI. Error UI fallback '易덃겘?잍닇鸚김뇰竊뚩??띹캊' implies chat API requests were blocked with connection termination (GOAWAY/RST_STREAM pattern from #519/#520/#523 consistent).

notes: 4-test sequence on same prompt shows intermittent APF behavior: pass(#522) ??block-generic(#523) ??pass(#524) ??block-generic(#525). Either: (a) alternating toggle rule (unlikely by design), (b) APF filter is A/B testing between filter rules, (c) dev is actively modifying APF config between each request, (d) qianwen CDN geo-routing serves different edge nodes per request. ROOT CAUSE REQUIRES ETAP SERVER LOGS correlated with request timestamps 2026-04-22T09:05/09:18/09:24/09:50 and chat2.qianwen.com destination. Block delivery mechanism (envelope ??content-render) still unresolved ??APF response is reaching the wire but qianwen SSE parser doesn't accept the format as a normal content message, triggering its native '易덃겘?잍닇鸚김뇰' fallback. Recommend server-side capture of exact bytes APF sends for a blocked response and compare against the qianwen format documented in #521_result.json.
